items.description: Scattered faint brownish spots and smudges in the middle-right area.
Vertical discoloration and wear along the right edge with minor abrasion.
Corner rounded and worn with visible creasing and minor material loss.

damage_notes: Right fore-edge shows vertical wear and discoloration.
Bottom-right corner exhibits handling wear and surface loss.
No major tears, holes, or losses elsewhere on the leaf.
summary: Page 5 is a largely blank folio. No marginalia, doodles, pen trials, or corrections visible. Only faint scattered stains and minor peripheral edge/corner damage present.
